zh.Dunster Castle, Williton, Somerset, Engl: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特
zh.Priory Church of St George, Dunster, Wil: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特聖 格奧智也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Mohun IV於1269年出生在英國薩默塞特登斯特時，他的父親Sir John Mohun20歲，母親Eleanor FitzPiers15歲。他於1290年與Ada de Tibetot結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1330年8月25日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特聖 格奧智也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.Dunster Castle, Williton, Somerset, Engl: 英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特
zh-hans.Priory Church of St George, Dunster, Wil: 英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特聖 格奧智也斯 邱奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Mohun IV于1269年出生在英国薩默塞特登斯特时，他的父亲Sir John Mohun20岁，母亲Eleanor FitzPiers15岁。他于1290年与Ada de Tibetot结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1330年8月25日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特聖 格奧智也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Mohun IV was born in 1269, in Dunster, Somerset, England, his father, Sir John Mohun, was 20 and his mother, Eleanor FitzPiers, was 15. He married Ada de Tibetot in 1290. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 August 1330, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Priory Church of St George, Dunster, Wil: St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Mohun IV est né en 1269, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Mohun, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Eleanor FitzPiers, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Ada de Tibetot en 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 août 1330, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Priory Church of St George, Dunster, Wil: St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John de Mohun IV 1269 in Dunster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Mohun 20 und seine Mutter Eleanor FitzPiers 15. Er hat 1290 Ada de Tibetot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. August 1330 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Mohun IV è nato il nel 1269 nel Dunster, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir John Mohun, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor FitzPiers, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Ada de Tibetot nel 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 agosto 1330, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Mohun IVが1269年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父Sir John Mohunは20歳，母Eleanor FitzPiersは15歳であった。1290年にAda de Tibetotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1330年8月25日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスタースト ジョージェ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Priory Church of St George, Dunster, Wil: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터 스트 조그'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: John de Mohun IV(이)가 1269년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Mohun(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor FitzPiers(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1290년 Ada de Tibetot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년 8월 25일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터 스트 조그'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.Priory Church of St George, Dunster, Wil: St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Mohun IV nasceu em 1269, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Mohun, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor FitzPiers, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Ada de Tibetot em 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1330, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Priory Church of St George, Dunster, Wil: ст джеорге'с чурч, дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Mohun IV родился в 1269 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Mohun было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor FitzPiers, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada de Tibetot в 1290 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 августа 1330 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности ст джеорге'с чурч, дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Mohun IV nació en 1269, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Mohun, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Eleanor FitzPiers, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Ada de Tibetot en 1290. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1330, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
